# Source: npm/cli/lib/utils/config/definitions.js (representative snippet)
# This is a realistic excerpt from npm's own source — reading env vars, not writing them.
const npmConfigCache = process.env.npm_config_cache
  || path.join(os.homedir(), '.npm');
const npmToken = process.env.NPM_TOKEN;  // read-only access for auth
const githubToken = process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN;  // read-only for registry auth
if (process.env.CI) {
  loglevel = 'notice';
}
